label: post_b23
note: after B23 Fable-agent implementation (62308 subagent_tokens, 14 tool_uses, 263687ms duration per Agent tool usage report). Five_hour jumped 28->39-40 (+11-12pts), contradicting the original ~200k-tokens/1pt observation that motivated this experiment. Cannot fully rule out parallel-session contamination during the interval (only endpoint spot-checks were done); session_id matched own session at both checks.
